title: Wastewater and health - Canada.ca
content:
## Wastewater and health
Wastewater management and health effects for the public and First Nations communities.

## Services and information

### Wastewater and the environment
Regulations, agreements, pollution, management and contacts

### Household reclaimed or recycled water
Domestic water reuse and reclamation, safe use, guidelines

### Wastewater in First Nations communities
Wastewater treatment, sewage treatment, on-site systems, community systems

### Wastewater monitoring
Diseases and locations monitored, methods for collecting data and testing
